Flight 079
Tzvi Aryeh Adler; illustrations Adi Katz; translation N. Davis
Publisher
Kosher Comics for Kids
Year
2016
Pages
71 pp.
A routine flight from Nairobi vanishes from the radar. Aboard are Rav Shaked and his sons — and a band of dangerous hijackers led by the Vulture.
Subjects
RabbisTerrorismHijacking of aircraft
